title: Sulfur Caves Backport
description: Backports the Sulfur Caves from the Chaos Cubed (26.2)  game drop. Does NOT backport the Sulfur Cubes.
body:
## **SULFER CAVES BACKPORT MOD**

**Backports the Sulfur Caves to older versions of MC, in a kinda shitty fasion.**

**Currently on Snapshot 3**

Sulfur Caves spawn similar to how they're stated to spawn on the wiki, though a bit rarer. Mob rates are 1:1 with the wiki outside of Sulfur Cubes, and Cinnabar / Sulfur distribution aint 1:1 but similar.

Includes all the cool new sounds! Very satisfying. 


![wow such cool sulfur cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fa3267e09ffd3ba498931d16c38c31e6f457f27.png)
